case_title: MAURICIO MEJIA SALINAS VS. MARIA GABRIELA BARAHONA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SALINAS, MAURICIO MEJIA AS TO DEFENDANT BARAHONA, MARIA GABRIELA DBA  TRANSPORTES NELIZ GODOY, JEANNETTE DBA  TRANSPORTES NELIZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GODOY, JEANNETTE DBA  TRANSPORTES NELIZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERIVE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARAHONA, MARIA GABRIELA DBA  TRANSPORTES NELIZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-26-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES EXCEPT DEFENDANT JEANETTE GODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MARIA GABRIELA BARAHONA.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--SAUL FERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MARIA GABRIELA BARAHONA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-26-2013 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALINAS, MAURICIO MEJIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GODOY, JEANNETTE DBA  TRANSPORTES NELIZ $8,315.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,390.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT MARIA GABRIELLA BARAHONA, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
